title: InterMed presentation corpus
description: Small set of real Modrinth mods that tell a launcher story: healthy pack, broken dependency, mixed loaders, duplicate ids, and a Forge stack.

scenarios.title: Healthy Fabric 1.20.1
scenarios.subtitle: Sodium · Iris · Lithium · Fabric API · Mod Menu
scenarios.narrative: A recognizable performance stack — the kind of instance ATLauncher ships every day. InterMed surfaces mixin intelligence and resource notes without false missing-dependency noise.

scenarios.title: Broken dependency
scenarios.subtitle: Iris without Sodium
scenarios.narrative: Iris requires Sodium. One ERROR with provenance — actionable before the user ever clicks Play.

scenarios.title: Mixed loaders
scenarios.subtitle: Fabric Lithium + Forge JEI
scenarios.narrative: Launcher instances occasionally accumulate cross-loader jars. InterMed flags mixed-loader-pack before a cryptic crash.

scenarios.title: Duplicate mod id
scenarios.subtitle: Two Sodium versions side by side
scenarios.narrative: Pack updates sometimes leave two builds of the same mod. duplicate-id catches it deterministically.

scenarios.title: Forge content pack
scenarios.subtitle: Create · JEI · Jade · Architectury
scenarios.narrative: Second ecosystem proof: Forge metadata, mixin overwrite effects, and resource-order notes on a real Create install.
